conditions: The account is below the root or one or more OUs with attached SCPs.
decision_context: Use when diagnosing an inherited deny or missing allow.
exclusions: This statement does not describe declarative-policy merge operators.

source_references.locator: SCP effects on permissions; SCP evaluation
source_references.supported_proposition: SCP permission availability is constrained at every parent level above an account.

statement: A principal in a member account can use a permission only when it is permitted by every applicable SCP in the path from the organization root through parent OUs to the account.
